data.file_name: Specific file name (leave empty to use the most recently modified .zip)

auth.title: Authorize Dropbox access
auth.description:
1. Open this link and sign in with the Dropbox account used by Fuelio:

[Authorize Dropbox access]({authorize_url})

2. Click **Allow**.
3. Copy the code Dropbox shows you and paste it below.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid or expired authorization code: generate a new one and retry

abort.already_configured: This Fuelio integration is already configured
